overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit urban commercial district during dusk. The character traverses elevated walkways and open plazas surrounded by holographic advertisements, glass skyscrapers, and cyberpunk storefronts with heavy neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway between holographic building and yellow safety railing

events.description: passing a seated person on the ground against the purple building wall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily behind another pedestrian along the narrow elevated walkway

notable_agents.action: person sitting on the ground leaning against the building wall
pedestrian with green hair and backpack walking ahead

entered.detail: tall building with purple and orange facade featuring large holographic advertisements
continuous yellow-orange safety barrier along the edge of the elevated walkway
tall cylindrical glass skyscraper with illuminated windows in the background
glowing purple and white holographic advertisements on the building wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow elevated walkway flanked by a purple building with holographic ads on the left and a yellow safety railing on the right. The scene is set during dusk with mixed natural and neon lighting. A person sits on the ground against the wall as the character passes by.

scene_state.functional_zone: storefront-lined elevated walkway with various shops

events.description: turning left at the corner, transitioning from purple holographic building to concrete storefronts

agents.ego_description: turning left at the corner and continuing past various storefronts including a laundromat and pawn shop

entered.detail: dark gray concrete building facade with various shop entrances and signage
red neon sign with Japanese characters indicating a laundromat
yellow and black sign reading 'EL DORADO PAWN SHOP'
red neon sign for 'BURRITO' with glowing arrow

segments.scene_description: After turning left at the corner, the walkway continues past a dark concrete building featuring various storefronts including a laundromat, pawn shop, and burrito stand. The yellow railing continues along the right side while the sky becomes more visible above.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching large billboard structure at plaza entrance

events.description: turning right into the open plaza area beneath the large Nicola billboard structure

agents.ego_description: approaching the plaza and turning right to enter the open area beneath the billboard

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead toward the plaza center

entered.detail: massive red structural framework supporting a large 'nicola' advertisement billboard
large pink neon sign reading 'BROOKLYN BARISTA' on the building facade
multi-story glass and concrete building with illuminated windows and neon accents

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a massive red billboard structure supporting a 'Nicola' advertisement. After turning right, the scene opens into a plaza with the 'Brooklyn Barista' neon sign visible on the right. The yellow railing ends as the walkway opens into the multi-level commercial plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-level commercial plaza with outdoor seating and palm trees

events.description: descending stairs into the lower level of the plaza

agents.ego_description: walking down the stairs and exploring the open plaza area with outdoor seating

notable_agents.action: person in yellow jacket walking across the plaza

entered.detail: cafe tables and chairs arranged outside the Brooklyn Barista shop
tall palm trees planted in the plaza center area
descending ramp and stairs leading to the lower tier of the commercial plaza

segments.scene_description: The character descends into a wide open plaza featuring the Brooklyn Barista cafe with outdoor seating, palm trees, and the massive Nicola billboard structure now to the left. The area features multi-level architecture with neon lighting and scattered pedestrians walking through the commercial space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow, neon-lit elevated walkway that gradually opens into a sprawling, multi-level commercial plaza. It begins by tracking the character past a purple building with holographic advertisements and a yellow safety railing, passing a lone figure sitting against the wall. As the camera turns a corner, the environment shifts toward a row of concrete storefronts including a laundromat and a burrito stand, while the dusk sky becomes more prominent above. The scene then expands as the character passes a massive red Nicola billboard and turns right, leaving the railing behind to enter a wide open space. Finally, the camera descends into the heart of the plaza, revealing the Brooklyn Barista cafe with its outdoor seating and palm trees amidst a crowd of pedestrians and towering cyberpunk architecture.
